test.command: go list ./internal/... | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/fase/internal/adapters/codex' | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/fase/internal/mcpserver' | xargs env GOMAXPROCS=4 go test

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expose the control-plane-worker skill through the Skill tool for mission workers, or update the bootstrap documentation to instruct workers to read .factory/skills/control-plane-worker/SKILL.md directly when the skill is not available via the Skill tool.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both features in verification-unification milestone (verification-unify-check-submission-contract and verification-central-gating-and-review-bundle) referenced skillName: 'control-plane-worker', but workers could not invoke it via the Skill tool during execution. Worker transcripts show: 'Tool: Skill {"skill": "control-plane-worker"} → Tool Result: Error: Skill "control-plane-worker" not found.' Workers manually read the skill file or followed mission procedures instead. This did not impact implementation quality for these features, but represents a systematic gap between feature metadata (skillName field) and runtime skill availability.
